[textmode.synth.js](../../../index.md) / [SynthSource](../../SynthSource.md) / invert

# Method: invert()

```ts
invert(amount?): this;
```

Invert colors.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `amount?` | [`SynthParameterValue`](../../../type-aliases/SynthParameterValue.md) | Inversion amount (default: 1.0) |

## Returns

`this`
